renewed commitment to transparency and accountability through open data
undertaking a concerted effort to consolidate datasets, codify and automate procedures to maintain all data, and improve the quality and granularity of our data

tool_args.label: Open Data Plan is a living document

payload.claim_text: This is a living document. Our aim is to be responsive to evolving operating realities and ridership needs.
payload.description: The Open Data Plan is described as an ongoing, responsive document

evidence_refs.source_quote: This is a living document. Our aim is to be responsive to evolving operating realities and ridership needs.

tool_args.label: Types of data already published by MTA

payload.claim_text: MTA has published data on its own website, including ridership, performance metrics, static and real-time GTFS, service information, system information, financials, and assets
payload.description: Existing published data categories

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA has published data on its own website, including ridership, performance metrics, static and real-time General Transit Feed Specification (GTFS), service information, system information, financials, and assets

tool_args.label: Categories of raw data collected by MTA

payload.claim_text: records related to the subway, bus, rail, and paratransit service we operate, including scheduled service and service as operated; workforce data; transactional records, including fare and toll records; financial data
payload.description: Raw data categories collected, processed, and analyzed by MTA

evidence_refs.source_quote: records related to the subway, bus, rail, and paratransit service we operate, including scheduled service and service as operated • workforce data • transactional records, including fare and toll records • financial data

tool_args.label: Implementation sequence priorities

payload.claim_text: Implementation of this plan follows a sequence prioritized broadly: continue publishing data supporting board and committee books; enhance published performance metrics datasets; publish financial data (budget and actuals); enhance the capital program data
payload.description: Prioritized implementation sequence for Open Data Plan

evidence_refs.source_quote: Continue publishing data supporting board and committee books • Enhance the published performance metrics datasets to increase their value • Publish financial data (budget and actuals) • Enhance the capital program data we are currently publishing

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

tool_args.label: Dataset refresh cycles - monthly with 6 exceptions

payload.claim_text: In most cases, these datasets need to be refreshed monthly with new data, with 6 having shorter than monthly refresh cycles, including our popular Daily Ridership dataset that we update each weekday
payload.description: Dataset refresh frequency specification

evidence_refs.source_quote: In most cases, these datasets need to be refreshed monthly with new data, with 6 having shorter than monthly refresh cycles, including our popular Daily Ridership dataset that we update each weekday

payload.description: MTA began expanding its Open Data by publishing a substantial amount of performance metrics data

evidence_refs.source_quote: We began expanding MTA's Open Data in December 2021 by publishing a substantial amount of performance metrics data

tool_args.label: NYS ITS Open Data assessment criteria

payload.claim_text: The NYS ITS Open Data handbook outlines criteria: value, quality, and readiness/availability being the primary measures. Value objectives: increases accountability and responsiveness, improves public knowledge of agency and its operations, furthers the mission of the agency, creates economic opportunity, responds to a need or demand identified after public consultation
payload.description: Criteria used to assess and prioritize datasets for the Open Data catalog

evidence_refs.source_quote: The NYS ITS Open Data handbook outlines criteria to use for this, with value, quality, and readiness/availability being the primary measures

Increases accountability and responsiveness • Improves public knowledge of agency and its operations • Furthers the mission of the agency • Creates economic opportunity • Responds to a need or demand identified after public consultation

tool_args.label: Developing processes to automate dataset publishing

payload.claim_text: To avoid being an excessive burden on internal resources, we are developing processes to automate the publishing of these refreshes. Additionally, we are building tools to remind staff of manual steps that need to be conducted and to alert our Open Data team if automation steps were not successfully completed or if datasets have not been refreshed per schedule.
payload.description: MTA developing automation for dataset refreshes and monitoring tools

evidence_refs.source_quote: To avoid being an excessive burden on internal resources, we are developing processes to automate the publishing of these refreshes. Additionally, we are building tools to remind staff of manual steps that need to be conducted and to alert our Open Data team if automation steps were not successfully completed or if datasets have not been refreshed per schedule.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: FOIL requests reviewed for frequently requested data

payload.claim_text: We have reviewed past requests submitted under the Freedom of Information Law (FOIL) to identify frequently requested data.
payload.description: FOIL requests used as input for Open Data plan development

evidence_refs.source_quote: We have reviewed past requests submitted under the Freedom of Information Law (FOIL) to identify frequently requested data.

tool_args.label: Scope exclusions: project-specific and not-yet-produced data

payload.claim_text: We have not included within this plan one-off project- and study-specific data that is collected or produced, and then analyzed in our planning efforts. We have not included within the open data catalog anticipated datasets that we are not yet producing.
payload.description: Types of data excluded from the Open Data catalog scope

evidence_refs.source_quote: we have not included within this plan one-off project- and study-specific data that is collected or produced, and then analyzed in our planning efforts
We have not included within the open data catalog anticipated datasets that we are not yet producing.

tool_args.label: Real-time data feeds not published as historical repository

payload.claim_text: Due to the volume of data that is transmitted through the feeds, we generally will not be publishing the entirety of that data in a historical repository. However, many of the performance metrics we are publishing are the result of aggregation of this operational data.
payload.description: Real-time feed data treatment in the Open Data catalog

evidence_refs.source_quote: Due to the volume of data that is transmitted through the feeds, we generally will not be publishing the entirety of that data in a historical repository. However, many of the performance metrics we are publishing are the result of aggregation of this operational data.

tool_args.label: Stakeholder engagement for Open Data plan

payload.claim_text: We have met with a number of transit advocates, open data experts, and good government groups and assessed the priorities for data that they have offered. We have also invited the general public to contribute to our plan.
payload.description: External stakeholder input solicited for Open Data plan development

evidence_refs.source_quote: We have met with a number of transit advocates, open data experts, and good government groups and assessed the priorities for data that they have offered. We have also invited the general public to contribute to our plan

tool_args.label: Developing processes to automate dataset publishing

payload.claim_text: To avoid being an excessive burden on internal resources, we are developing processes to automate the publishing of these refreshes. Additionally, we are building tools to remind staff of manual steps that need to be conducted and to alert our Open Data team if automation steps were not successfully completed or if datasets have not been refreshed per schedule.
payload.description: MTA developing automation for dataset refreshes and monitoring tools

evidence_refs.source_quote: we are developing processes to automate the publishing of these refreshes. Additionally, we are building tools to remind staff of manual steps

tool_args.label: Plans to improve existing datasets

payload.claim_text: Many of the datasets we have published to date can be improved, by adding supporting data fields that would provide greater context to the calculations or other fields within the dataset, improving the dataset structure to ease analysis, and/or increasing granularity. In some cases, we may choose to consolidate datasets where we believe that will improve analysis.
payload.description: Planned improvements to published datasets

evidence_refs.source_quote: Many of the datasets we have published to date can be improved, by adding supporting data fields that would provide greater context
